title: koeleria eriostachya
intro: Koeleria eriostachya, also known as crested hair grass, is a perennial grass native to Asia and Europe. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Koeleria eriostachya can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, infusion, and extract, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
